c.d: Number of users who actively use the app daily, indicating strong engagement for regular friend communication
c.s: App Store analytics, Google Play Console, third-party market research reports

c.d: Number of different communication methods available (text, voice, video, stories, group chat, etc.)
c.s: App store descriptions, feature documentation, user manuals

c.d: Availability across different operating systems and devices (iOS, Android, Web, Desktop)
c.s: Official app stores, developer websites, platform documentation

c.d: Average user rating across app stores, reflecting overall user experience and reliability
c.s: App Store ratings, Google Play Store ratings, user review aggregators

c.d: Quality and reliability of instant messaging, live video calls, and real-time features
c.s: App feature lists, user reviews, technical specifications
